module.name: common
module.purpose: Shared interfaces used across the second-generation source tree, including typed TOML configuration that detects and exports the host Platform before loading the rest of config, runtime Marix path defaults and role-specific overrides, config-gated logging, directional chat request/response message envelopes, shared channel errors, remoc session/task protocol messages, shared tool schema and parameter protocol types used by both the client tool layer and the agent engine, and centralized crate-local external-library namespaces.

childModules.name: channel
childModules.purpose: Shared channel error type and crate-internal remoc SessionEvent protocol with separate request-message and response-message task payloads.

childModules.name: config
childModules.purpose: Strongly typed TOML configuration loader with host Platform detection, source-tree/deployment/environment config discovery, runtime Marix path resolution, optional core settings, agent/client settings, logging flags, alias substitution, and credential resolution.

childModules.name: external
childModules.purpose: Crate-local third-party library namespace wrappers, including image ImageReader, reqwest blocking client, remoc connection helpers, serde derive traits, serde_json values/macros, tokio runtime/network types, and toml parsing.

childModules.name: logging
childModules.purpose: Config-gated logging API with tagged log messages, structured logging errors, direct log/warning/error/debug functions, runtime Marix path based log directory selection, timestamped log files, and log-file pruning.

childModules.name: message
childModules.purpose: Folder-based shared request and response message traits, serializable envelopes, complete chat request payloads, and streamed chat response segment payloads.

childModules.name: protocol
childModules.purpose: Shared tool protocol types ToolSchema and ToolParameter, singly owned here and referenced by both the client tool layer and the agent engine so a tool's declared JSON-Schema document and its schema-conformant argument payload cross the session boundary unchanged.
